question: How many objects are on the black stone background? Select from the following options: (A) Four: fresh octopus, lemon, some herbs, and spices. (B) Three: fresh octopus, lemon, and some herbs. (C) Two: fresh octopus and some herbs. (D) Five: fresh octopus, lemon, some herbs, spices, and a wooden box.
gold_answer: Five: fresh octopus, lemon, some herbs, spices, and a wooden box
answer_choices: Four: fresh octopus, lemon, some herbs, and spices
Three: fresh octopus, lemon, and some herbs
Two: fresh octopus and some herbs
